name: enlightenment-now
description: Steven Pinker's Enlightenment Now — data-driven toolkit defending reason, science, humanism, and progress, showing how Enlightenment values have made the world better
useCase: Understand global progress data, counter modern pessimism, defend reason and science, and apply Enlightenment values to current challenges
knownRisks: Pinker's optimistic data analysis has been criticized by some scholars for cherry-picking metrics
The book does not fully address systemic issues like persistent inequality in wealthy countries
The defense of Enlightenment values may feel naive to readers who have experienced institutional failure or oppression
